news.headline: King Charles Will Not Meet Epstein Victims During U.S. State Visit
news.summary: Representative Ro Khanna had asked Buckingham Palace for a private meeting between the victims and King Charles during his planned visit to the U.S. next week.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent says Gulf, Asian allies request swap lines
news.summary: Bessent pushed back on allegations that Trump family's financial ties with UAE are driving decision to offer swap line.
